backend_agent.description: Backend logic specialist for core Python modules (reader, analyzer, sharpness, duplicates, utils, formatting, models, cli, visualizer). No GUI/Tkinter code.

gui_agent.description: GUI/Tkinter specialist for gui.py, sharpness_gui.py, and controllers.py. Handles layout, threading, event handling, and ImageTk constraints.

test_agent.description: Testing specialist for the tests/ directory. Writes, organizes, and runs pytest tests with proper mocking patterns.

build_agent.description: Build/CI specialist for scripts/, .github/workflows/, and pyproject.toml. Handles PyInstaller, GitHub Actions, Poetry, and code signing.

photo_researcher_agent.description: Photo technical and artistic research specialist. Consulted when requirements are vague, requiring deep domain knowledge in photography, metadata standards, image quality metrics, or color science.

ux_agent.description: Professional design, user experience (UX) flow, user patterns, and flow analysis specialist. Designs premium interface aesthetics, micro-interactions, layout ergonomics, and monitors user interaction trends.
